ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "current_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current company the employee is affiliated with */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "reporting_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's reporting manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_current_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_reporting_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "date_from" TEXT /* Date the employee started working at the company */,
  "date_to" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped working at the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title the employee held at the company */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change in company affiliation occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., new affiliation, termination) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_changes_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_changes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR manager, employee, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt for the password hash */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record being accessed (e.g., employee, company) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_skills" (
  "employee_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee skill */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee skill record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee skill record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_skills_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company-industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company-industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)
